unreadable_regions: Some displayed equations have damaged glyph encoding in extracted text, so equation explanations rely on rendered formula crops plus surrounding prose.
notes: The paper header, three figure crops, and seven formula crops were generated for this validation run.
No standalone tables were confidently detected in the source PDF; the table section is preserved as a structural note rather than a fabricated asset block.
The recovered numbered equations contain a visible gap before Eq. (9), so the asset bundle remains partial under the stricter formula-audit rule.
This run validates the skill's partial-output behavior as well as its polished Chinese research-brief format.
